zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 155 of file zsh.c.

155                                                          {
156   if (!output) {
157     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
158   }
159 
160   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
161                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
162                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
163                   "\n"
164                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
165                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == -* ]]; then\n"
166                   "    _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
167                   "    return 0\n"
168                   "  fi\n"
169                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
170                   "  _arguments -s \\\n"
171                   "    '1: :->mode' \\\n"
172                   "    '(*):args:_ascii_chat_args' && return\n"
173                   "  [[ -n \"$state\" ]] || return 1\n"
174                   "  case $state in\n"
175                   "    mode)\n"
176                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
177                   "      server_modes=(\n");
178 
179   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
180   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
181   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
182   if (mode_server_descs) {
183     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
184       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
185     }
186     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
187   }
188 
189   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
190                   "      client_modes=(\n");
191 
192   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
193   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
194   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
195   if (mode_client_descs) {
196     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
197       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
198       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
199         continue;
200       }
201       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
202     }
203     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
204   }
205 
206   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
207                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
208                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
209                   "      ;;\n"
210                   "  esac\n"
211                   "}\n"
212                   "\n"
213                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
214                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
215                   "    server)\n"
216                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
217                   "      ;;\n"
218                   "    discovery-service)\n"
219                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
220                   "      ;;\n"
221                   "    client)\n"
222                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
223                   "      ;;\n"
224                   "    mirror)\n"
225                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
226                   "      ;;\n"
227                   "    discovery)\n"
228                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
229                   "      ;;\n"
230                   "    *)\n"
231                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
232                   "      ;;\n"
233                   "  esac\n"
234                   "}\n"
235                   "\n"
236                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
237                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
238 
239   /* Server options - grouped by category */
240   size_t server_count = 0;
241   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
242 
243   if (server_opts) {
244     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
245     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
246   }
247 
248   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
249                   "}\n"
250                   "\n"
251                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
252 
253   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
254   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
255   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
256       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
257 
258   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
259     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
260     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
261   }
262 
263   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
264                   "}\n"
265                   "\n"
266                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
267                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
268 
269   /* Client options - grouped by category */
270   size_t client_count = 0;
271   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
272 
273   if (client_opts) {
274     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
275     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
276   }
277 
278   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
279                   "}\n"
280                   "\n"
281                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
282 
283   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
284   size_t mirror_count = 0;
285   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
286 
287   if (mirror_opts) {
288     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
289     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
290   }
291 
292   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
293                   "}\n"
294                   "\n"
295                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
296                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
297 
298   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
299   size_t discovery_count = 0;
300   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
301 
302   if (discovery_opts) {
303     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
304     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
305   }
306 
307   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
308   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
309                   "}\n"
310                   "\n"
311                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
312 
313   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
314 }




References get_modes_by_group(),
    options_registry_get_for_display(), SAFE_FREE, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().

    ascii-chat
